info.title: MCP Server for Excel
info.description: Excel automation for AI assistants - manage Sheets, Power Query, DAX, VBA, Tables, Ranges, Formatting, Validation and more. Requires Excel to be installed. Only runs on Windows.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for Microsoft Excel automation.
Provides 22 tools with 195+ operations for AI assistants.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Show version information
Without options, starts the MCP server in stdio mode.
Requirements:
- Windows x64
- Microsoft Excel 2016 or later (desktop version)
Documentation:
https://sbroenne.github.io/mcp-server-excel/
Source:
https://github.com/sbroenne/mcp-server-excel
